title: Tome III Act 9: The Seventh Capital

story.text:
# 📖 Tome III Act 9: The Seventh Capital
**act** · shared · narrative

C55 — Privacy as the Seventh Capital. Privacy is foundational alongside the six classical capitals; normative-architectural confidence ~70%. Resonance mana register opens (🔭 · the 7th Capital in motion).
